title: Perform techniques that prevent cross-contamination
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform techniques that prevent cross-contamination demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare for sampling or transfer

pcs.text: Check the sampling procedure conforms with the required sampling plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the sampling procedure conforms with the required sampling plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the sampling procedure conforms with the required sampling plan.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use specified personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use specified personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Prepare the work area for safe and effective sample workflows
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare the work area for safe and effective sample workflows?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare the work area for safe and effective sample workflows.

pcs.text: Select equipment and materials specified by the procedure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select equipment and materials specified by the procedure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select equipment and materials specified by the procedure.

pcs.text: Organise equipment to minimise contamination during manipulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise equipment to minimise contamination during manipulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise equipment to minimise contamination during manipulations.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label containers for clear identification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label containers for clear identification.

pcs.text: Record details in relevant log or database
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record details in relevant log or database?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record details in relevant log or database.

pcs.text: Macroscopically assess media and/or reagents to confirm integrity before use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Macroscopically assess media and/or reagents to confirm integrity before use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Macroscopically assess media and/or reagents to confirm integrity before use.

elements.title: Transfer materials

pcs.text: Protect the integrity of the sample source
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Protect the integrity of the sample source?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Protect the integrity of the sample source.

pcs.text: Perform transfer while minimising opportunities for contamination and/or cross-infection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform transfer while minimising opportunities for contamination and/or cross-infection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform transfer while minimising opportunities for contamination and/or cross-infection.

pcs.text: Protect the integrity of the sample source and destination after transfer, and before sealing the transport or culture vessel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Protect the integrity of the sample source and destination after transfer, and before sealing the transport or culture vessel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Protect the integrity of the sample source and destination after transfer, and before sealing the transport or culture vessel.

pcs.text: Perform quality control checks to confirm contaminate-free transfer was successful
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform quality control checks to confirm contaminate-free transfer was successful?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform quality control checks to confirm contaminate-free transfer was successful.

pcs.text: Label transport or culture vessels for clear identification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label transport or culture vessels for clear identification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label transport or culture vessels for clear identification.
